name: Group Policy History
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Registry-side record of recently applied Group Policies — GUID, version, and application timestamp per GPO.
forensic_value: Reveals which GPOs have been applied and when — changes to this history (or gaps in expected GPO application) may indicate GPO manipulation by an attacker with domain admin access. Useful for confirming whether a GPO-delivered malicious script was actually applied.
